name: Mobb Deep
bio: Mobb Deep's catalog remains one of East Coast rap's most durable assets, driven by classic production and continued discovery by new listeners.
notable_for: Hard-edged New York rap storytelling and foundational 1990s catalog status.
career_highlight: Their best-known records still circulate through rap playlists, documentaries, and soundtrack-style usage.
revenue_drivers: Streaming catalog demand keeps their core songs active.
Publishing royalties continue from songwriting ownership.
Film, documentary, and cultural references keep the catalog commercially relevant.
